title: T-044 — OEE per-minute aggregation job + line SSE event stream (08-PROD-f, §6 D7 / FR-08-E6-002)
prompt:
# T-044 — OEE per-minute aggregation job + line SSE event stream

PRD: docs/prd/08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §6 D7, §7.6 FR-08-E6-001..005, §8.1 SCR-08-07, SCR-08-11
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement the per-minute OEE aggregation job that writes `oee_snapshots` rows (T-008) with A/P/Q decomposition per (line_id, shift_id, minute_bucket), plus the GET endpoints powering the OEE foundation dashboard and a Server-Sent Events stream for SCR-08-11 Line Detail live events.

## Implementation contract
1. `packages/api-services/production/oee-aggregation.ts` exports `aggregateOeeMinuteBucket(lineId, minuteStart)` computing:
   - Availability = (planned_min − downtime_min) / planned_min from `downtime_events`
   - Performance = (output_qty × ideal_cycle_time) / run_time_min from `wo_outputs` + `lines.nominal_cycle_kg_h`
   - Quality = good_qty / total_output_qty (good = output − rework − scrap) from `wo_outputs` + `wo_waste_log` qa-reject rows
   - Composite = A × P × Q
2. Idempotent upsert on `(line_id, shift_id, minute_bucket)` (V-PROD-10) — running the job twice for the same bucket produces the same row.
3. `apps/web/app/api/internal/jobs/production/oee-aggregate/route.ts` Vercel cron runs every 60s covering the last full minute per line.
4. `apps/web/app/api/production/oee/route.ts` — `GET ?line_id=&period=today|7d|30d` returns A/P/Q + composite + per-line breakdown for SCR-08-07; 30s cache header.
5. `apps/web/app/api/lines/[id]/events/route.ts` — SSE endpoint emitting WO/downtime/output events for SCR-08-11; supports reconnect via `Last-Event-ID`.

## Files
- packages/api-services/production/oee-aggregation.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/internal/jobs/production/oee-aggregate/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/oee/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/lines/[id]/events/route.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/__tests__/oee-aggregation.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/oee/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a line with 60 min planned, 5 min downtime, 1000 kg output and 50 kg quality waste, when `aggregateOeeMinuteBucket` is called for the minute and called again, then exactly one `oee_snapshots` row exists for `(line_id, shift_id, minute_bucket)` with A/P/Q matching the formulas in §6 D7 (idempotent upsert).
2. Given pre-existing `oee_snapshots` rows for today, when `GET /api/production/oee?period=today` is called, then response has `availability`, `performance`, `quality`, `composite` and a per-line breakdown, with `Cache-Control: max-age=30`.
3. Given a client connects to `/api/lines/[id]/events` and a `wo.started` event then a `downtime.started` event are emitted, then both arrive in order over SSE with monotonically increasing `id:` fields and the stream survives reconnection via `Last-Event-ID`.

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/api-services/production/__tests__/oee-aggregation.test.ts + apps/web/app/api/production/oee/__tests__/route.test.ts asserting idempotent upsert, formula correctness, GET shape and SSE ordering before code exists.
- Run `pnpm vitest run packages/api-services/production/__tests__/oee-aggregation.test.ts apps/web/app/api/production/oee/__tests__/route.test.ts`
- Run `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not violate V-PROD-10 uniqueness on `(line_id, shift_id, minute_bucket)`.
- Do not stream PII over SSE (operator names are denormalized; never include `users.email` or `pin_hash`).
- Do not return 15-OEE advanced analytics (EWMA, six-big-losses); those are owned by 15-OEE per §8.1 SCR-08-07 boundary clarification.
- Do not block the cron tick if a single line aggregation errors — log and continue.

pipeline_inputs.description: Per-minute OEE aggregation job + GET endpoints + line SSE event stream; idempotent upsert on (line_id, shift_id, minute_bucket).
pipeline_inputs.details: Aggregation formulas per §6 D7. Cron tick reads last full minute and upserts; idempotent so reruns are safe (V-PROD-10). GET /api/production/oee returns A/P/Q + composite + breakdown for SCR-08-07 with 30s cache. SSE /api/lines/[id]/events emits WO + downtime + output events with monotonic ids and Last-Event-ID reconnect; never streams PII. Advanced analytics (EWMA, six-big-losses) explicitly out-of-scope and live in 15-OEE per §8.1 SCR-08-07 boundary clarification.
out_of_scope: Do not implement OEE/Line UI parity (T-049, T-050)
Do not implement EWMA / six-big-losses (15-OEE module)
acceptance_criteria: Given a line with 60 min planned, 5 min downtime, 1000 kg output, 50 kg quality waste, when aggregateOeeMinuteBucket runs twice for the minute, then exactly one oee_snapshots row exists with A/P/Q matching §6 D7 formulas (idempotent upsert).

Given pre-existing oee_snapshots for today, when GET /api/production/oee?period=today is called, then response has availability/performance/quality/composite + per-line breakdown with Cache-Control: max-age=30.

Given an SSE client connects to /api/lines/[id]/events and wo.started then downtime.started are emitted, then both arrive in order with monotonic id: fields and the stream survives reconnect via Last-Event-ID.
test_strategy: RED: __tests__/oee-aggregation.test.ts + apps/web/app/api/production/oee/__tests__/route.test.ts asserting idempotent upsert, formula correctness, GET shape + cache header, SSE ordering and reconnect before code exists.
risk_red_lines: Do not violate V-PROD-10 uniqueness on (line_id, shift_id, minute_bucket).
Do not stream PII over SSE.
Do not return 15-OEE advanced analytics from this endpoint.
Do not block the cron tick if a single line aggregation errors.
